query:
SELECT sl.surveyId, s.id, c.name, c.source 
FROM share_links sl 
JOIN surveys s ON s.id = sl.surveyId
JOIN customers c ON c.id = s.customerId
WHERE sl.token = 'vn3b_k7IF6mM8DU4jFMbNhH1Z6zgv9yT';

SELECT st.id, st.name, st.sourceId, src.name as source_name
FROM survey_templates st
JOIN sources src ON src.id = st.sourceId;
